original_image_tags: Scanned document showing the back of a folded white envelope. The envelope flap is open at the top. Below the flap, typed text identifies the contents. A red, handwritten file number is visible in the lower right quadrant.

elements.description: A scanned image of a physical envelope flap or backing paper with typed text: 'Enclosure - To Bureau', 'Photographs of "Flying Disc" found at Saybrook, Ill. 7-26-47', and 'SI File 62-0-1445'. There is also a handwritten annotation in red ink: '62-83894-71'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content of an envelope back with typed text and a red handwritten annotation, but Description B provides specific quoted text that Description A omits, with no direct contradiction on verbatim content.
